codes.meaning: The requested outcome is authored narrative or editorial content, outside the six frozen software-delivery intents.
The requested outcome is audiovisual or visual-media production, outside the six frozen software-delivery intents.
The requested outcome is personal or household planning, outside the six frozen software-delivery intents.
The requested outcome is individualized regulated professional advice, outside the six frozen software-delivery intents.
The requested outcome concerns design, diagnosis, or repair of a physical system, outside the six frozen software-delivery intents.
The requested outcome is native, game, desktop, or embedded software rather than a frozen v1 software-delivery intent.
